name: RNEGeoChart
description: Map chart component for geographic data. Displays regions colored by value with optional visual map legend and tooltips.

data.name: data
data.description: Chart data: array of { name, value } for each region. Region names must match the map GeoJSON feature names. Example: [{name: 'United States', value: 500}, {name: 'China', value: 600}]

mapJson.name: mapJson
mapJson.description: GeoJSON map to display. Pass the FeatureCollection; it will be registered with mapName.

mapName.name: mapName
mapName.description: Name used when registering the map. Use the same value in the chart option. Default: 'world'

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to show the legend for the color scale (visual map). Default: true

showHighlighter.name: showHighlighter
showHighlighter.description: Whether to emphasize (highlight) the hovered region. Default: true

tooltip.name: tooltip
tooltip.description: Built-in React Native region tooltip overlay when renderTooltip is omitted: card (default), compact, kpi, striped, or none to hide the overlay.

renderTooltip.name: renderTooltip
renderTooltip.description: Optional (params) => ReactNode for the RN tooltip body at the pointer. When set, replaces the layout chosen by tooltip. Params: region name, value, color, pointerX and pointerY.

visualMapMin.name: visualMapMin
visualMapMin.description: Minimum value for the visual map scale. Auto-derived from data if not set.

visualMapMax.name: visualMapMax
visualMapMax.description: Maximum value for the visual map scale. Auto-derived from data if not set.

visualMapMode.name: visualMapMode
visualMapMode.description: Visual map mode: 'continuous' (gradient) or 'piecewise' (distinct bands). Default: 'continuous'

piecewisePieces.name: piecewisePieces
piecewisePieces.description: When visualMapMode is 'piecewise', define bands: [{ min, max, label, color }]. Example: [{ min: 0, max: 45, label: 'Low', color: '#3b82f6' }, { min: 45, max: 100, label: 'High', color: '#dc2626' }]

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Default: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Default: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override. Merged with default theme from ChartThemeContext.

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors.
